summary: A Newsmax2 remote interview with ICE Acting Executive Associate Director Marcos Charles. He says ICE's mission stays the same despite mayors and governors and cites National Guard deployment, shown with Portland protest b-roll. The segment is a televised news interview with no music.
notable_text: NEWSMAX2; 'TRUMP THREATENS TO LOCK UP PRITZKER'; 'Marcos Charles | ICE Acting Executive Associate Director'
